_comment: DO NOT EDIT: WATERDOGPE EGG FOR PTERODACTYL - ZORNER.MEN
name: Waterdog PE
author: @ZORNER
description: Bedrock proxy like BungeeCord for Minecraft Bedrock Edition, with support for x86/x64 and ARM64 architectures.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt update
apt install -y curl wget

if [ ! -d /mnt/server ]; then
    mkdir /mnt/server
fi

cd /mnt/server || exit 1

if [[ "${SERVER_JARFILE}" == "*\.jar" ]]; then
    echo -e "adding.jar to server file name"
    SERVER_JARFILE="${SERVER_JARFILE}.jar"
fi

if [ -z "${WATERDOG_VERSION}" ] || [ "${WATERDOG_VERSION}" == "latest" ]; then
    echo -e "downloading latest waterdog pe build\n"
    wget -O ${SERVER_JARFILE} https://github.com/WaterdogPE/WaterdogPE/releases/download/latest/Waterdog.jar
else 
    echo -e "downloading waterdog pe build ${WATERDOG_VERSION}\n"
    wget -O ${SERVER_JARFILE} https://github.com/WaterdogPE/WaterdogPE/releases/download/${WATERDOG_VERSION}/Waterdog.jar
fi

# wget -O Waterdog.jar https://github.com/WaterdogPE/WaterdogPE/releases/latest/download/Waterdog.jar

chmod +x ${SERVER_JARFILE}

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "WaterdogPE @ZORNER"
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Waterdog PE Version
variables.description: The build to pull and install. (Ex. v2.0.3), or set to latest This is the build number on https://github.com/WaterdogPE/WaterdogPE/releases
